user.title: Set Up HA Alarm
user.description: Create your alarm panel. Sensors and notification targets can be configured after setup.

error.code_too_short: Code must be at least 4 digits.

sensors.title: Configure Sensors
sensors.description:
Suggested sensors are pre-filtered by the device classes typical for each mode. Use the Additional Sensors pickers for any sensors that don't have a device class assigned.

• Home: door, window, garage door, glass break, lock
• Away: door, window, motion, vibration, lock, glass break, sound
• Night: door, window, motion, lock, glass break
• Vacation: door, window, motion, smoke, CO, moisture, glass break, lock
• Custom: all sensors (no filter)

delays.title: Entry / Exit Delays
delays.description: Set entry and exit delays (seconds) per arm mode. Set to 0 for instant arming/triggering.

data.name: User Name
data.is_admin: Admin (can arm, disarm, and manage settings)

remove_code.title: Remove User
remove_code.description: Select the user to remove. The last admin cannot be removed.

notifications.title: Configure Notifications
notifications.description: Enter notify service targets as a comma-separated list (e.g. notify.mobile_app_my_phone, notify.my_group). Toggle which events trigger a notification.

data.code_arm_required: Require a code to arm (disarm always requires a code)

error.code_too_short: Code must be at least 4 digits.
error.name_exists: A user with that name already exists.
error.last_admin: Cannot remove the last admin user.
